title.zh: 中国猫经济机会分析：室内精养、情绪消费与高频复购
title.en: China Cat Economy Opportunity Analysis: Indoor Precision Care, Emotional Consumption, and High-Frequency Repeat

summary.zh: 中国猫经济是宠物赛道里更强的结构性机会，核心增长来自室内养猫场景、精养需求、情绪消费和高频复购类产品，而不是泛宠物逻辑。
summary.en: China's cat economy is one of the stronger structural opportunities inside the pet category. The growth is driven by indoor-cat scenarios, precision care, emotional consumption, and high-frequency repeat products rather than broad pet logic.

highlight.zh: 猫经济强在场景密度和复购结构
highlight.en: The strength of cat economy lies in dense scenarios and repeat structure

recommendedActions.zh: 优先围绕猫主食湿粮、猫砂清洁、室内用品 3 条方向补平台样本
recommendedActions.en: Add platform samples around wet food, litter-cleaning, and indoor cat supplies first

recommendedActions.zh: 继续拆猫经济中的高频复购品和内容型爆品
recommendedActions.en: Continue splitting the cat economy into repeat-heavy products and content-friendly breakout items

watchReason.zh: 猫相关消费增速和城市适配性普遍强于狗，是宠物赛道中更值得优先看的结构性方向
watchReason.en: Cat-led spending and urban fit are broadly stronger than dog-led demand, making this a priority structural direction in the pet category
